[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000110 2
1 1000000000 1
2 0000000000 a
3 0010000010 2
4 0000011011 4
5 0000000000 a
6 0100100011 4
7 0000000000 a

01 10 0100000000 1
12 21 0100000000 1
23 32 0000000110 2 match 0
34 43 0000000110 2 match 0
45 54 1000000000 1 match 1
56 65 0000000000 a match 2 5 7
67 76 0010000010 2 match 3
70 07 0000011011 4 match 4

02 20 0100100011 4 match 6
13 31 0000000000 a match 2 5 7
24 42 0000000110 2 match 0
35 53 0000010000 1
46 64 0010000110 3
57 75 0000010000 1
60 06 0000100010 2
71 17 0010000000 1

03 30 0000011010 3
14 41 0010000000 1
25 52 0100000000 1
36 63 0001000110 3
47 74 0010000010 2 match 3
50 05 0100010000 2
61 16 0010000000 1
72 27 0000000011 2

15 51 0100000000 1
26 62 0000100110 3
37 73 0000011010 3
